installCommand: cd server && npm ci --omit=dev --omit=peer --omit=optional && npx --yes prisma generate && rm -rf node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/*sqlserver* node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/*postgresql* node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/*mysql* node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/*cockroachdb* node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/*.map node_modules/@cloudflare
